metadata.governanceNote: Risk Intelligence supports prioritization and collaboration. It does not replace formal investigation, associate relations review, legal review, law-enforcement guidance, or corporate security judgment.

signals.summary: Management reported that a customer made verbal threats towards an associate due to being stopped for a transaction issue. Law enforcement was notified and escorted the customer off property. No injuries were reported and no impact to business operations. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.
signals.recommendedAction: Review incident details, preserve available evidence, and validate law enforcement coordination path.

signals.summary: Management reported that on 8/27/25 a former associate sent a threatening text message to an associate due to a personal issue. The victim associate will notify law enforcement for assistance. • Notice: If the incident involved a threat or physical assault with or without a weapon, please be sure to follow the link below to create an event in the Auror app. • Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.
signals.recommendedAction: Review incident details, preserve available evidence, and validate law enforcement coordination path.

signals.summary: Management reported a customer allegedly made threats of violence towards a third party delivery driver, due to unknown reasons. No additional information was provided at this time.
signals.recommendedAction: Review incident details, preserve available evidence, and validate law enforcement coordination path.

signals.summary: Management reported that an associate allegedly made a threat of physical harm against the store manager for an unknown reason. Management is investigating, and no injuries were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.
signals.recommendedAction: Review incident details, preserve available evidence, and validate law enforcement coordination path.

signals.summary: Management reported that an associate was terminated for gross misconduct and caused a disturbance by refusing to leave and making verbal threats toward the facility. Law enforcement was notified, but the individual left the property before their arrival. No impact to business operations.
signals.recommendedAction: Review incident details, preserve available evidence, and validate law enforcement coordination path.

signals.summary: Management reported that an associate was yelling that they were going to have a breakdown, and began throwing merchandise to the ground. Management was given Lyra resources. Law enforcement was not notified, and no injuries or impacts to business operations were reported. Call Lyra at 800-825-3555 or email care@lyrahealth.com. Learn more at walmart.lyrahealth.com Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.
signals.recommendedAction: Review incident details, preserve available evidence, and validate law enforcement coordination path.

signals.summary: Management reported an individual forced entry into a closed facility and left the facility with unpaid merchandise. Law enforcement was notified. No impact to store operations.

signals.summary: Management reported that an unknown amount of individuals forcefully entered the battery cage and stole merchandise. Law enforcement was not notified and no impact to business operations were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.
signals.recommendedAction: Review incident details, preserve available evidence, and validate law enforcement coordination path.

signals.summary: Update (12/17/25 5:46 AM CST): The individuals did flee with multiple batteries. Management reported two masked individuals broke the lock on the exterior battery cage but were interrupted by security. The individuals fled without any merchandise. Law enforcement assistance was not needed.
signals.recommendedAction: Review incident details, preserve available evidence, and validate law enforcement coordination path.

signals.summary: Management reported an associate's relative physically assaulted the associate due to a personal issue. Management responded to the area, but the subject fled the area prior to their arrival. Law enforcement was notified for assistance. No injuries were reported. Notice: If the incident involved a threat or physical assault with or without a weapon, please be sure to follow the link below to create an event in the Auror app. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

signals.summary: Management reported that an unknown individual entered the facility with a shotgun and left the facility shortly afterward. No threats were made, no injuries were reported, and the store did not evacuate. Law enforcement was notified and stated that they had been attempting to make contact with the individual throughout the morning.
signals.recommendedAction: Review incident details, preserve available evidence, and validate law enforcement coordination path.

signals.summary: Management reported that an unknown individual was found in the parking garage with a self-inflicted gunshot wound. EMS and law enforcement responded, and the individual was pronounced deceased at the scene. No impacts to store operations were reported.
signals.recommendedAction: Review incident details, preserve available evidence, and validate law enforcement coordination path.

signals.summary: Management reported a child stayed under the Deli table while their parent continued shopping. No injuries or damage to the facility were reported. Management notified law enforcement. The parent retrieved the child before law enforcement's arrival. No impacts to business operations were reported.
signals.recommendedAction: Review incident details, preserve available evidence, and validate law enforcement coordination path.

signals.summary: Management reported that an associate witnessed an individual physically assaulted another individual in their vehicle due to unknown reasons. The associate intervened and notified law enforcement. However, another individual inside the vehicle exited, and made threats, prompting the vehicle to flee the parking lot prior to law enforcement arriving. No further incident was reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.
signals.recommendedAction: Review incident details, preserve available evidence, and validate law enforcement coordination path.

scoringModel.description: Counts security/threat signals associated with the facility.
Elevates violence, weapon, threat, and high-impact incident patterns.
Adds urgency for unresolved work that affects protection posture.
Considers camera/NVR, access-control, network, and evidence-path gaps.
Includes active fire trouble, deficiencies, and assurance exceptions.
Uses canonical facility risk profile as the stabilizing baseline.

bestPractices.title: Workplace violence / threat assessment reference
bestPractices.guidanceSummary: Use structured threat assessment, preserve evidence, document facts, and coordinate with security/law enforcement channels as appropriate.
recommendedActions: Validate local law enforcement contact path

bestPractices.title: Soft target and crowded places protective measures
bestPractices.guidanceSummary: Review protective measures for public-facing facilities, including access, monitoring, emergency communications, and coordination planning.

bestPractices.title: Protective security planning
bestPractices.guidanceSummary: Align protective measures with current threat environment and control posture.

bestPractices.title: Workplace violence prevention reference
bestPractices.guidanceSummary: Use hazard recognition, reporting, prevention controls, and worker communication for workplace violence risk contexts.

bestPractices.title: Fire/life-safety inspection and retest posture
bestPractices.guidanceSummary: Fire-system deficiencies should be corrected, retested, and documented with appropriate evidence and AHJ awareness where required.

bestPractices.title: Identify → Act → Verify evidence loop
bestPractices.guidanceSummary: Every material risk signal should result in an accountable action, owner, SLA, and evidence-backed closure state.
